seo.title: Terms of use | Alfora
seo.description: Conditions for responsibly using Alfora’s tools.

page.title: Terms of use
page.description: These conditions explain the responsible use of the tools available on Alfora.

legal.acceptanceText: By accessing and using Alfora, users accept these terms and agree to use the platform responsibly and in accordance with the law.
legal.serviceText: Alfora provides free creative tools accessible through the browser. Features may be changed, updated, suspended or removed when necessary.
legal.responsibilityText: Users are responsible for the files and content they process, having the necessary rights to use them, reviewing results and keeping copies of their original files.
legal.prohibitedText: Alfora may not be used for illegal, fraudulent or harmful activities; infringement of third-party rights; introduction of malicious code; disruption of the platform; or processing content without authorization.
legal.availabilityText: Alfora is provided as is. Uninterrupted availability, compatibility with every device and suitability of every result for each purpose are not guaranteed. Users must verify results before using them.
legal.changesText: These terms may be updated when the platform’s features or legal and operational needs change.
